subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! [3.5s]... ...Among the greatest of all services that can possibly be rendered by man to Almighty God is the education and training of children
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء تعلیم اطفال و تربیت نونهالهای جنت ابهی از اعظم خدمات درگاه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @education of children; moral education, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance
